title: taraxacum rivulare
intro: Taraxacum rivulare, also known as the lesser dandelion or false dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion family with yellow flowers and jagged leaves. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate liver and kidney issues due to its diuretic and choleretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum rivulare include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Taraxacum rivulare can be consumed as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as capsules and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
